productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Men Nighthawk Black Casual Shoes
description: If you thought that casual shoes are just casual, think again! These shoes from the United Colours of Benetton are casual with a funky, hip twist. The plaid checks make the light-weight shoes all the more attractive, adding to their boyish charm. Hang out with the cool gang in them, and you will easily become the coolest member of the group! Look stylish and wow in these comfortable shoes all day long. Upper Upper made of woven wool blended fabric in plaid checks for durability, comfort and style Mid-cut design for ankle support and lateral stability Leather overlays on the forefoot, behind the collarm and around the lace up system for better structure and style Lace-up system with synthetic laces for a snug, customized Fit Mildly padded tongue and cushioned collar for in-step comfort Upper stitched onto the outsole for durability Midsole Phylon midsole for lightweight responsive cushioning and shock absorption Cushioned footbed for all-day comfort Outsole Lightweight, slip-resistant rubber outsole for better shock absorption Herringbone pattern for excellent traction shoe care Wipe surface with soft, clean, dry cloth to remove dust Do not machine wash Do not store in direct sunlight
